title: Description
description: Capture a human-friendly title and narrative context for an entity.

contentSchema.title: Description payload
contentSchema.description: Define descriptive fields shown in UI and used by AI prompts.

schema.title: Title
schema.description: Display title shown to end users.

schema.title: Description
schema.description: Narrative text describing what the entity represents.

title: Concept
description: Business concept definition for the logical model — multiple concept facet assignments may exist on the model root entity.

contentSchema.title: Concept payload
contentSchema.description: One business concept per facet assignment; concepts[] is retained for compatibility and must contain exactly one entry.

schema.title: Concepts
schema.description: Exactly one concept entry per facet assignment. Model entities hold many concepts through many concept facet assignments.

items.title: Concept entry
items.description: Business concept definition, tags, and indicative SQL hint.

schema.title: Description
schema.description: Metadata-quality narrative definition of the business concept.

schema.title: Indicative SQL
schema.description: Indicative SQL hint for extracting or identifying the concept in data; reasoning guidance only.
